title: Halloween Pack
description: It's a great texture pack for Halloween
body:
![PrideTuve Logo](https://primary.jwwb.nl/public/s/l/t/temp-zwkyqrxattdguhclibtl/kopievonpride14545-1.png)
# Halloween Pack
**This texture pack adds Halloween and general fall textures to Minecraft. It's a great texture pack for Halloween and fall to get into the Halloween spirit. Since the texture pack is currently still in progress, there are not many textures yet. Please let us know what textures you would like to see in the texture pack in the future. We are always open to feedback <3**

![Texture Pack Screenshots](https://primary.jwwb.nl/public/s/l/t/temp-zwkyqrxattdguhclibtl/gk52mc/untitleddesign46.png?enable-io=true&enable=upscale&crop=1439%2C1000%2Cx1%2Cy0%2Csafe&width=1085&height=754)
<details>
<summary>Current textures:</summary>

- Lush Cave Vines
- Cherry Log
- Cherry Planks
- Cherry Door
- Cherry Leaves
- Spore Blossom
- Pink Petals
- Sweet Berry
- Stripped Cherry Log
- Cherry Trapdoor
- Red Moon Texture
- Red End Sky Texture
</details>
